note: reasoning_trace per atom (which abstract sentence, why distinct, predicted density) + overall trace recording that params were read. R9/R10.

overall_trace.step: read direction_params (epoch 1) then decompose 3 verbatim abstracts
overall_trace.inputs_seen: direction_params.params = all 0.5 (neutral baseline, no labels yet); 3 verbatim abstracts re-sourced this run (P1 Grassmannian MoE 4 sentences, P2 Fisher-Rao 2, P3 thermodynamic computing 4).
overall_trace.reasoning: At epoch 1 the params are neutral (0.5), so sourcing has no directional bias yet; I reuse the same 3-paper corpus as Run 18 so future epochs' param nudges are the ONLY thing that changes the search behaviour (clean convergence experiment). I decompose each abstract into its distinct mechanism/clause atoms, keeping problem-statement (P1_S1) and gap (P3_S2) sentences as context (is_mechanism=false later) for contrast.
overall_trace.decision: 10 atoms: P1->4, P2->2, P3->4; params recorded; baseline epoch.
overall_trace.confidence: high - abstracts re-sourced verbatim this run; sentence boundaries are clear
overall_trace.could_be_wrong_if: reusing the Run 18 corpus instead of fresh papers makes epoch 1 less independent -- mitigated because the convergence target is search_quality of the QUERIES, not the papers.

reasoning_trace.reasoning: Generic MoE motivation, not a transferable mechanism; predict dense-by-topic but will read as context.
reasoning_trace.could_be_wrong_if: the exact tradeoff phrasing is rarer than the concept

reasoning_trace.reasoning: Exotic directional-statistics construct (Matrix Bingham gating) -- distinct from the entropy-control function; predict sparse.
reasoning_trace.decision: keep as mechanism atom; predict sparse
reasoning_trace.could_be_wrong_if: von Mises-Fisher routing makes it denser

reasoning_trace.inputs_seen: concentration matrix controls routing entropy, replaces top-k
reasoning_trace.reasoning: The functional knob (entropy control), separable from the Bingham generative story; predict moderate.
reasoning_trace.decision: keep as mechanism atom; predict moderate
reasoning_trace.could_be_wrong_if: entropy-controlled routing is denser than expected

reasoning_trace.inputs_seen: amortized VI for posterior routing distributions
reasoning_trace.reasoning: A Bayesian inference mechanism for routing, separable from geometry; predict sparse-moderate.
reasoning_trace.decision: keep as mechanism atom; predict sparse-moderate
reasoning_trace.could_be_wrong_if: bare amortized VI pulls the VAE literature

reasoning_trace.inputs_seen: information geometry of the induced probability path for diffusion schedules
reasoning_trace.reasoning: Framing-as-information-geometry; distinct from the specific Fisher-Rao result; predict sparse-moderate.
reasoning_trace.decision: keep as mechanism atom; predict sparse-moderate

reasoning_trace.reasoning: Specific result: Fisher-Rao geometry -> cosine optimality; predict sparse.
reasoning_trace.decision: keep as mechanism atom; predict sparse

reasoning_trace.reasoning: The thermodynamic-computing paradigm; distinct from the EDDP result; predict moderate (niche field).
reasoning_trace.decision: keep as mechanism atom; predict moderate

reasoning_trace.reasoning: Gap/motivation sentence; context not mechanism; predict moderate (tracks field size).
reasoning_trace.could_be_wrong_if: phrased generically enough to pull broad energy work

reasoning_trace.reasoning: The trade-off triad; distinct from the specific EDDP metric; predict moderate.
reasoning_trace.decision: keep as mechanism atom; predict moderate
reasoning_trace.could_be_wrong_if: the triad framing is rarer than its pairwise parts

reasoning_trace.reasoning: Headline coined metric (EDDP) on entropy-production-bound machinery; predict sparse term, mature toolkit.
reasoning_trace.decision: keep as mechanism atom; predict sparse (coined metric)
reasoning_trace.could_be_wrong_if: 'entropy production bounds' pulls the large stochastic-thermo literature
